problems.cause: AGREE function declaration syntax error in annex block
problems.minimal_edit: Replace 'function' with 'eq' for function definitions in AGREE annex

executor_steps: In the AGREE annex block, change 'function min(x: real, y: real, z: real) : real =' to 'eq min(x: real, y: real, z: real) : real ='
In the AGREE annex block, change 'function concurrencyFactor(recovery_time: real, failure_time: real) : bool =' to 'eq concurrencyFactor(recovery_time: real, failure_time: real) : bool ='
